data.title: Web3 liquidity infrastructure protocol Orderly announces integration of Story Protocol
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Web3 liquidity infrastructure protocol Orderly announced that it has completed integration with Story Protocol. Story Protocol now supports more than 100 contract trading pairs on Orderly, with up to 50 times leverage. It is reported that Orderly is supported by more than 20 professional market makers including Wintermute and Riverside, providing deep market depth and tight spreads to ensure that DeFi users get the best trading experience. Currently, Orderly supports EVM and non-EVM chains including Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, Mantle and Solana.

data.title: Currently, 11 lawsuits and investigations against crypto companies/individuals have been dismissed or suspended by the US SEC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: So far, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has dismissed or suspended lawsuits and investigations against 11 crypto companies/individuals, including: Binance (February 10), Coinbase (February 21), OpenSea (February 21), Robinhood (February 24), Uniswap (February 25), Gemini (February 26), Justin Sun (February 26), Consensys (February 27), Kraken (March 3), Yuga Labs (March 4), DRW (March 4). (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Fold Holdings Increases Bitcoin Reserves By Nearly 50%
data.description: According to PANews, Fold Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: FLD) has expanded its Bitcoin holdings by acquiring an additional 475 BTC through convertible notes. This acquisition raises the company's total Bitcoin reserves to 1,485 BTC, marking a nearly 50% increase in their holdings. With this move, Fold Holdings has entered the top ten U.S. publicly traded companies in terms of Bitcoin holdings.

data.title: U.S. Stock Futures Rise Following Economic Data Release
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on March 7, U.S. stock futures experienced a short-term increase following the release of non-farm payroll and unemployment rate data. The Dow Jones Industrial Average futures rose by 0.43%, the S&P 500 futures increased by 0.57%, and the Nasdaq futures climbed by 0.77%.

data.title: Dollar Index Experiences Short-Term Fluctuations
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on March 7, the U.S. Dollar Index (DXY) experienced a brief decline of over 20 points before recovering, currently standing at 103.77. In response, non-U.S. currencies saw upward movements. The euro against the dollar (EUR/USD) rose nearly 30 points in the short term, while the British pound against the dollar (GBP/USD) increased by approximately 40 points. Additionally, the U.S. dollar against the Canadian dollar (USD/CAD) fell more than 20 points, and the U.S. dollar against the Japanese yen (USD/JPY) dropped over 40 points.

data.title: Ethereum Pectra delays upgrade due to testing vulnerability and will conduct additional testing
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Ethereum developers have decided to postpone the upgrade and conduct further testing due to vulnerabilities caused by configuration errors on the test networks Holesky and Sepolia during the Pectra upgrade. The postponement was originally planned to determine the mainnet release date of Pectra in a conference call on March 6, but due to unstable testing, developers decided to create a "shadow fork" of the Holesky test network so that key stakeholders (such as staking pools and DApp developers) can continue to test its code before Pectra is officially launched. The Holesky network is expected to resume normal operation on March 28. (CoinDesk)

data.title: U.S. February Unemployment Rate Rises Slightly
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the United States reported an unemployment rate of 4.1% for February, slightly higher than the anticipated 4.00% and the previous month's figure of 4.00%.

data.title: Federal Reserve's March Rate Decision Likely To Remain Unchanged
data.description: According to Odaily, CME's 'FedWatch' tool indicates a 91% probability that the Federal Reserve will maintain its current interest rates in March. There is a 9% chance of a 25 basis point rate cut. Looking ahead to May, there is a 53.8% likelihood that rates will remain unchanged, a 42.5% probability of a cumulative 25 basis point cut, and a 3.7% chance of a cumulative 50 basis point reduction.

data.title: U.S. Nonfarm Payrolls Miss Expectations, Signaling Potential Softening in Labor Market
data.description: Key Takeaways:February Nonfarm Payrolls (NFP) came in at 151,000, below expectations of 160,000.The previous month’s NFP was revised downward from 143,000 to 125,000, indicating weaker-than-reported job growth.The report suggests a slight cooling in the labor market, which could increase the likelihood of future Federal Reserve rate cuts.Labor Market Shows Signs of CoolingOn March 7, the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) reported that seasonally adjusted Nonfarm Payrolls (NFP) for February stood at 151,000, missing the forecast of 160,000.Additionally, January’s NFP was revised downward from 143,000 to 125,000, reinforcing a slower pace of job growth.Key Implication: A weaker-than-expected jobs report could fuel expectations for earlier Federal Reserve rate cuts, as the labor market softens.Market and Federal Reserve ImplicationsIncreased Rate Cut ProbabilityWith job growth slowing, the Fed may lean toward cutting rates sooner to prevent a further economic slowdown.The March Fed meeting (March 19-20) will be closely watched for any shift in tone on monetary easing.Bond Market ReactionLower-than-expected payrolls could push Treasury yields lower, as investors price in a more dovish Fed stance.Impact on Bitcoin and Crypto MarketsCrypto markets typically react positively to expectations of lower interest rates, as liquidity conditions ease.A weaker labor market could reinforce Bitcoin’s long-term appeal as a hedge against monetary expansion.What’s Next?March 12: U.S. CPI Inflation Report, a key data point that will influence Fed policy.March 19-20: Federal Reserve Meeting, where policymakers may signal future rate cut plans.Further labor market data to assess whether the cooling trend continues.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 90,000 USDT with a Narrowed 0.36% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 07, 2025, 13:37 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 90,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 90,009.929688 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.36% decrease in 24 hours.
